headline: Fifth Third Stock Down as Q1 Earnings Miss, Expenses Rise Y/Y
summary: FITB stock lost nearly 1.3% after Q1 earnings miss as rising expenses and higher credit provisions offset strong NII and fee income growth.

raw.headline: Fifth Third Stock Down as Q1 Earnings Miss, Expenses Rise Y/Y
raw.summary: FITB stock lost nearly 1.3% after Q1 earnings miss as rising expenses and higher credit provisions offset strong NII and fee income growth.

headline: M&T Bank price target raised to $235 from $233 at DA Davidson
summary: DA Davidson raised the firm’s price target on M&T Bank to $235 from $233 and keeps a Neutral rating on the shares after its better than expected Q1 results. Given the improvement in credit trends, M&T lowered its CET1 target to a range of 10.0%-10.5%from 10.25%-10.5% vs. 10.33% in Q1, and thus, the firm expects the bank will remain aggressive with share repurchases as a partial offset to net interest income, the analyst tells investors in a research note. headline: FNB Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues & Expenses Rise Y/Y
summary: F.N.B. Corp's Q1 earnings meet estimates, as higher NII and loan growth lift revenues, though rising expenses and provisions temper the overall performance.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on M&T Bank, Lowers Price Target to $253
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Dave Rochester   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $255 to $253.
